goal: 隐藏 Mainline actor refs 避免 GitHub 首页 recent pushes

summary.title: Hide actor logs from GitHub branch activity
summary.what: Moved Mainline actor logs from refs/heads/_mainline/actor/* branch refs to refs/mainline/actors/*/log custom refs, kept legacy fetch/read compatibility, updated setup rewiring, and documented the new storage layout.
summary.why: GitHub surfaces refs under refs/heads as recently pushed branches, so internal actor log pushes were appearing on repository homepages for users.
summary.user_goal: 隐藏 Mainline actor refs 避免 GitHub 首页 recent pushes

decisions.chose: use refs/mainline/actors/<actor>/log outside refs/heads by default
decisions.rationale: custom refs stay Git-native and push/fetchable without triggering GitHub branch activity UI

decisions.chose: normalize legacy actor_log_prefix values to the hidden default while still fetching and reading legacy branch refs
decisions.rationale: existing actor log history remains available during rollout

decisions.chose: make the first hidden actor-log write use the legacy actor ref as its parent when no hidden ref exists
decisions.rationale: new logs continue the existing chain instead of splitting history

decisions.chose: remove legacy actor push refspecs but keep legacy fetch refspecs in doctor/init rewiring
decisions.rationale: new clients stop updating GitHub-visible branches while still reading older clients

rejected.alternative: hide this with GitHub UI or tag settings
rejected.reason: the root cause is that actor logs were branch refs under refs/heads; settings would not protect future users

rejected.alternative: delete legacy actor branches automatically during setup
rejected.reason: existing repositories should only delete remote legacy refs after hidden refs have been published; automatic remote deletion would be surprising

review_notes: Focused tests cover hidden ref construction, legacy-parent migration, configured push refspec behavior, and doctor/setup rewiring.
go test -tags quick ./... still times out in the existing internal/engine TestTrace_LimitTruncatesAndFlagSet/testRepo path; the affected focused suites pass.

architectural_claims: The canonical actor-log namespace is refs/mainline/actors/<actor_id>/log, not refs/heads/_mainline/actor/<actor_id>.
Legacy branch-backed actor logs are read-compatible migration inputs, not push targets.
behavioral_changes: New actor-log writes use custom refs outside refs/heads so GitHub does not show them as recently pushed branches.
sync fetches both hidden actor refs and legacy branch actor refs during migration.
doctor --setup --fix removes the legacy actor push refspec and adds the hidden actor push/fetch refspecs.
A first hidden actor-log write can continue from an existing legacy local or remote actor ref.

data_model_changes.name: Actor log Git ref namespace
data_model_changes.migration_notes: Existing refs/heads/_mainline/actor/* refs are still fetched/read; new writes use hidden custom refs. Existing remote legacy branches can be deleted after hidden refs are published.

security_implications: No hosted telemetry path was added; actor logs remain Git-backed repository data.
migration_notes: Existing configs with actor_log_prefix = "_mainline/actor" normalize to the hidden default at read time.
Existing remote refs/heads/_mainline/actor/* branches are not deleted automatically; they stop receiving pushes once refspecs are rewired.
